query: Acebuilder complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Ace Hardware Reviews & Complaints | Page 3
results.content:
Reviewed Aug. 22, 2024

For a company trying to compete with Lowe's, Home Depot, and Amazon, their online process and distribution is so broken I'm surprised the company still exists. I ordered two items totaling $400 online with a delivery date of 3 days later. After 5 days I called the store who had no idea why it was cancelled, and referred me to a corporate number. I was then told the order was cancelled the day after it was received, but they could not explain why, and I was never sent any updates. It is frustrating to have to track down your own order and find out later it was never even sent. No communication, no updates, no explanation. I was trying to use a local store, but it turns out that Amazon is quicker, and slightly cheaper.

Thanks for your vote!

JuniorMetairie, LA [...] An extremely frustrating and time consumning call, where she also all but refused to let me speak to anyone else. A manager could call me later if I wanted. Why does Ace say it will deliver items when apparently that's not guaranteed? Shouldn't that clearly be stated on the Web site? I don't want to order something for delivery only to be told later I have to go pick it up. That seems awfully close to bait and switch. Not ethical.

Thanks for your vote!

LauraSugar Land, TX

Customer ServicePriceStaff

Reviewed Oct. 1, 2019 [...] Why do they even offer items that are not available to them? I would never have messed around for a week waiting on items that I was needing for an event at my house. I ordered in good confidence that they would be in before the 7 days since it stated 1-7 days. Not only did they not make it for the event but now I have to go try to find something that will work on my patio for another event. Very frustrating to have such poor customer service. This looks like an ongoing problem as I have read multiple reviews with this same complaint. Do NOT use them for anything that they offer online, obviously, they just advertise items that are not even available.

Thanks for your vote!

JohnRingle, WI

Customer ServiceOnline & AppStaff

results.title: Ace Hardware is rated "Bad" with 1.6 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Evaluating 48 reviews, most reviewers were let down by their experience overall. Many people found customer service severely lacking, often unhelpful, rude, or nonexistent. Customers frequently encountered issues with online orders, including cancellations, missing confirmations, and problems with tracking or processing. Additionally, many felt product prices were significantly higher than other r etailers, with some describing the markup as excessive. However, some people mentioned positive interactions with helpful and knowledgeable staff. Conversely, a small portion of people felt staff could be unhelpful, disrespectful, or accusatory, leading to frustrating in-store experiences. A few customers also reported receiving defective products or items that broke shortly after purchase.See [...] products or items that broke shortly after purchase.See more [...] Ace Hardware's system is broken. Their communication is nonexistent. Their customer service is useless. They ruined what should have been a highlight of our family reunion. I’ve shopped at Ace for years expecting small-town reliability with big-box inventory, but this experience proves they’re just another unreliable corporation that doesn’t care once the order is placed.

Do not buy from Ace Hardware online. They will let you down at the worst possible time with zero accountability. I will be taking my business elsewhere and warning everyone I know.

Strongly recommend avoiding Ace Hardware for any time-sensitive or important purchases.

July 3, 2026

# Building Excellence

What We Do

## No Project Too Big. No Project Too Small.

Our mission is to provide our customers with the highest quality structures, in a timely manner, and at a fair price. We strive to build relationships with our customers by providing excellent customer service and staying in compliance with all safety measures for our workers and yours.

Commercial Steel Structures [...] Commercial Steel Structures

Our commercial steel buildings are designed to provide our customers with the highest quality, durability, and affordability. We offer a variety of styles, sizes, and designs–no job is too big or too small.

Other Services 

We offer a variety of services ranging from in-house engineering, code compliance, and turn-key solutions, to general contractor services, and sub-contractor services.
